reforms.description: The Finnish government has launched an ambitious programme to promote green innovation, targeting EUR50 billion in the cleantech sector by 2020, in partnership with public and private stakeholders. This initiative is supported by various policies aimed at fostering innovation in clean technologies, which is expected to enhance green growth.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The focus on green innovation and clean technologies is expected to drive economic growth and sustainability.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been launched and is actively being implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change aimed at promoting green innovation on a large scale.
reforms.source_quote: Finland is a strong innovator in clean technologies... to accelerate the move towards green growth, the government has launched an ambitious programme to promote green innovation.

reforms.description: The Finnish government has revised the university funding model to allocate research grants based on performance, aiming to improve academic outcomes and accelerate the transition to working life. This approach emphasizes the importance of monitoring direct public funding to ensure efficient resource allocation, particularly for basic research and education.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the funding model, the reform aims to improve research quality and relevance, which can lead to better economic outcomes.
reforms.status_evidence: The revised funding model has been put into practice and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a major overhaul of the funding model for universities, impacting the entire academic research landscape.
reforms.source_quote: Continue to support innovation using a broad approach. Monitor the impact of direct public funding to ensure efficient resource allocation and prioritise support to activities generating positive externalities, such as basic research and education.

reforms.description: The Finnish government is conducting a time-limited trial on R&D tax credits to evaluate their effectiveness in supporting private sector R&D.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: While the trial aims to support R&D, the effectiveness and potential distortions of tax credits are still under evaluation.
reforms.status_evidence: The trial has been announced but is not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This trial represents a significant evaluation of existing innovation instruments but is not a comprehensive reform.
reforms.source_quote: Consider whether a R&D tax credit would be a more efficient instrument for supporting private sector R&D.

reforms.description: The Municipality of Salo is implementing strategies to address the economic challenges following the closure of the Nokia plant, including support for entrepreneurship and job-search assistance for laid-off workers.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Supporting entrepreneurship and job-search assistance is expected to stimulate local economic recovery and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategies have been actively implemented in response to local economic challenges.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative is significant for the local economy but does not represent a national-level reform.
reforms.source_quote: The Salo Business Service Center... offers business services to small and medium enterprises (SMEs), support for international expansion and advice for start-ups.

reforms.description: The Finnish government has launched an ambitious package of structural reforms aimed at boosting productivity growth in public services and enhancing the employability of older workers through training.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing employability through training is expected to improve workforce productivity and adaptability.
reforms.status_evidence: The package of reforms has been announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in public services and workforce development.
reforms.source_quote: The government has announced an ambitious package of structural reforms to boost productivity growth in public services and enhance the employability of older workers.

reforms.description: The Masto project was implemented to prevent depression and related work disability by addressing mental health issues early, promoting well-being at work, and facilitating rehabilitation and return to work.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving mental health and well-being at work, the project aims to enhance productivity and reduce work disability.
reforms.status_evidence: The project has been successfully implemented and is currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: While important for workplace health, this project is more of a targeted initiative rather than a broad reform.
reforms.source_quote: The government, recognising the overlap between mental illness and incapacity for work, has run the Masto project (2007-11) to prevent depression and depression-related work disability.

reforms.description: Finland has launched the Future of Migration 2020 Strategy to enhance immigration policies, aiming to improve employment opportunities for immigrants and integrate them into the labor market.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving employment opportunities for immigrants is expected to enhance the labor market and contribute to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy has been announced but is not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This strategy is significant for labor market integration but does not represent a comprehensive reform.
reforms.source_quote: Finland has already launched several programmes to promote immigration and enhance integration, notably the Future of Migration 2020 Strategy.
